description: Soft sustained tones that anchor the listener in the present moment.
Resonant tones designed to quiet mental chatter and invite stillness.
Subtle harmonic layers that soften attention and expand awareness.
Flowing tones that bring mental clarity and sharp awareness.
Ultra-low frequencies that ease the nervous system into deep relaxation.
Warm, drifting tones that carry tension away breath by breath.
Golden hour resonance for end-of-day release and restoration.
Blurred edges and soft shimmer for the liminal space between wake and sleep.
The steady pulse of ocean waves on a calm shoreline.
Rain falling through a dense canopy, washing the world clean.
Cold, clear water flowing over smooth stones in high altitude silence.
The dawn chorus that signals a fresh beginning.
